name: transactions_capture
description: Capture an authorized transaction to settle the funds. Can capture full or partial amount.

parameters.name: transactionId
parameters.description: ID of the authorized transaction to capture.

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: Amount to capture (optional, defaults to authorized amount).

body.query: mutation CaptureTransaction($input: CaptureTransactionInput!) { captureTransaction(input: $input) { transaction { id status } } }
